response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with recent hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js at Acme and Pinepoint, plus React and MongoDB exposure. Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly matching the AI agent development requirement. Strong polyglot background (TS, Java, Python-adjacent, DLang), TDD/CI/CD craftsmanship culture, and AWS/Docker/Kubernetes experience align well with the stack. Main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mentions and limited recent Kotlin work, but the foundation is strong enough to ramp quickly.
strengths: Recent TypeScript/Node.js + React + MongoDB + AWS production experience at Pinepoint and Acme
Active AI-agent and MCP tooling work at current role matches a key requirement
Deep software craftsmanship background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing frameworks
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in the stated stack
Kotlin/Java experience is dated (robotic arms era) rather than recent backend service work
Heavy DLang focus in side projects may signal preference for niche stacks over the team's primary tooling

key_factors.factor: Fullstack TS/Node + React experience exceeds 6+ years
Missing explicit Nest.js and Vitest exposure
